title: DevOps Engineer Roadmap
description: A comprehensive guide to becoming a DevOps Engineer, focusing on automation, infrastructure, and collaboration.

stages.title: Programming & OS
stages.description: Foundational knowledge for automation and system management.

modules.title: Learn a Scripting Language
modules.description: Master Python or Go for automation scripts.

modules.title: Linux Fundamentals
modules.description: Understand the command line, file system, and process management.

modules.title: Networking Basics
modules.description: Learn about TCP/IP, DNS, HTTP, and firewalls.

stages.title: Infrastructure as Code (IaC)
stages.description: Manage and provision infrastructure through code.

modules.title: Configuration Management
modules.description: Learn Ansible for automating system configuration.

modules.title: Containerization
modules.description: Master Docker for creating and managing containers.

modules.title: Container Orchestration
modules.description: Learn Kubernetes to manage containerized applications at scale.

modules.title: Infrastructure Provisioning
modules.description: Use Terraform to build, change, and version infrastructure safely.

modules.title: Understand CI/CD Concepts
modules.description: Learn the principles of continuous integration, delivery, and deployment.

modules.title: CI/CD Tools
modules.description: Get hands-on experience with GitHub Actions or Jenkins.

modules.title: Monitoring Tools
modules.description: Learn Prometheus for metrics and Grafana for visualization.

modules.title: Logging
modules.description: Understand centralized logging with the ELK Stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana).

stages.title: Cloud Providers
stages.description: Master one of the major cloud platforms.

modules.title: Choose a Cloud Provider
modules.description: Deep dive into AWS, Google Cloud, or Azure.

modules.title: Cloud Native Technologies
modules.description: Explore services like serverless functions, managed databases, and object storage.
